m1_5_roadmap_items.requirement: Electron Forge + Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind project skeleton
verified_evidence: apps/desktop/package.json contains React 18, Electron 35, Vite, TypeScript, and React plugin dependencies
W1.5.79-W1.5.80 established React/Vite renderer and Electron main/preload/window wiring
remaining_gap: Both require a separate dependency gate

m1_5_roadmap_items.requirement: main/preload/renderer with contextIsolation, sandbox, and strict CSP
verified_evidence: W1.5.80 real Electron window navigation guard and eager sidecar startup

m1_5_roadmap_items.requirement: sidecar spawn, token injection, port probing, and READY stdout capture
verified_evidence: W1.5.2-W1.5.21 sidecar lifecycle, runtime.lock, startup status, registry, and IPC bridge
W1.5.85 real Python sidecar stream smoke
W1.5.94-W1.5.104 provide a focused read-only Canvas scaffold with local selection, navigation, summary, and type focus evidence
W1.5.108-W1.5.112 local draft, intent, preview, and send guard
W1.5.150-W1.5.169 local metadata-only send/history/focus and visual smoke matrix evidence
remaining_gap: Real chat command routing is not implemented
Runtime mutation and persistence are intentionally out of the local scaffold boundary

verified_evidence: W1.5.113-W1.5.149 cover stream collapse, details, content rendering, unknown event handling, and visual smoke matrix hardening

m1_5_roadmap_items.requirement: Task Drawer, Dock, File Tree, and Version Snapshots
verified_evidence: W1.5.89-W1.5.93 shell chrome, Task Drawer collapse, Chat Box collapse, File Tree scaffold, and Version Snapshot scaffold
remaining_gap: Task mutation commands are not implemented
File operations and persisted version snapshot actions are not implemented
electron-updater and electron-builder are not approved or installed
Cross-platform installer startup evidence is not available

phase_1_exit_readiness.reason: FR-001 through FR-020 still require a formal UX acceptance checklist and several surfaces remain scaffold-only or dependency-gated.
End-to-end demo workflow and export artifact evidence belong to M1.6.
CW-Bench v0.1 pass-rate evidence is planned after the demo workflow.
A1 spec conformance review must run across Phase 1 before phase exit.
Global locked error-code coverage must be audited before phase exit.
A3 security audit report is not yet recorded for Phase 1 exit.
Electron packaging/updater dependencies are not approved or installed.
Adapter conformance must be re-run across PydanticAIAdapter and ClaudeCodeAdapter before phase exit.
Failure taxonomy unknown-rate evidence is not yet recorded for Phase 1 exit.
A8 git-history audit must verify automatic commit/tag behavior before phase exit.
Completed Run replay from stream-events.jsonl plus trace.sqlite still needs phase-level evidence.
React Flow 100-node drag performance cannot be measured before the React Flow dependency gate.
